name: apppilot
description: AI-first browser executor. The primary path runs caller-provided browser actions and returns structured perception + screenshots. The caller LLM owns the reasoning loop; this tool only drives the browser.

element_index.description: Index from the perception element list. Preferred targeting method.

text.description: Text to type, or text label fallback for targeting.

prompt.description: Prompt shown to the human operator for human_input actions.

key.description: Key name for keypress/keydown/keyup, e.g. ArrowUp, Enter, w, Space.

reason.description: Optional explanation of why this action is being taken.

extract_schema.description: For extract actions: JSON schema mapping output keys to CSS selectors. Use {"selector": "...", "attribute": "text|html|href|src|count|exists", "multiple": true, "fields": {...}} for nested data. Aliases: attr is accepted as attribute.

run.description: Execute a caller-provided list of browser actions and return the resulting page state.

actions.description: JSON array of action objects (see definitions.action).

start_url.description: Initial URL to open before executing actions.

task.description: Description of what is being tested. Used for the saved session record.

headless.description: Run the browser without a visible window. Use --headed to set false.

dashboard.description: Start the live streaming dashboard server.

open_browser.description: Open a web browser to the dashboard.

output_dir.description: Root directory for sessions, screenshots, and reports. Set via BC_OUTPUT_DIR or this flag; required unless BC_OUTPUT_DIR is set.

extracted_data.description: Structured data returned by the last successful extract action, if any.

steps.description: List of executed actions with errors and target metadata.

perception.description: Final page perception: URL, title, elements, logs, network summary, page errors.

exit_codes.1: An action failed, arguments were invalid, or the session could not be saved.

snapshot.description: Load a URL and return the current screenshot plus page perception.

perception.description: Page perception: URL, title, elements, logs, network summary, page errors.

inspect.description: Print a saved session summary without replaying it.

replay.description: Replay a saved session over the dashboard WebSocket.

session.description: Start a persistent browser session with a streaming dashboard and a control WebSocket. The browser stays open until the process is stopped.

headless.description: Run the browser without a visible window.

dashboard_port.description: Port for the dashboard HTTP/WebSocket server. If omitted, a random high port is chosen.

control_port.description: Port for the control WebSocket server. If omitted, a random high port is chosen.

open_browser.description: Open a web browser to the dashboard.

output_dir.description: Root directory for sessions, screenshots, and reports. Set via BC_OUTPUT_DIR or this flag; required unless BC_OUTPUT_DIR is set.

action_delay.description: Pause before each action in ms.

wait_after.description: Pause after each action in ms.

run_session.description: Send an action batch to a running apppilot session via its control WebSocket.

actions.description: JSON array of action objects (see definitions.action).

start_url.description: Initial URL to open before executing actions.

task.description: Description of what is being tested.

extracted_data.description: Structured data returned by the last successful extract action, if any.

new_test.description: Reset a running session for a fresh test. Navigates the browser to about:blank and clears the dashboard filmstrip/history.

apppilot_execute.description: Execute a sequence of browser actions and return the resulting page state. The caller LLM decides the actions; this tool only drives the browser. Supports structured data extraction via the extract action. Returns final perception and any extracted data; a screenshot is omitted when the last action is extract to save tokens.

apppilot_snapshot.description: Load a URL in the browser and return a screenshot plus page perception.

apppilot_inspect.description: Print a summary of a saved session without replaying it.

apppilot_replay.description: Replay a saved browser session over the dashboard WebSocket.

apppilot_run_session.description: Send an action batch to a running apppilot session via its control WebSocket.
